headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Extra Space Storage, Raises Price Target to $154
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Eric Luebchow   maintains Extra Space Storage (NYSE:EXR) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $148 to $154.
